headline: Rockwell Automation (ROK) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of industrials automation company Rockwell (NYSE:ROK) jumped 2.6% in the after-market session after the company was commissioned to provide a robotic system for food producer Cranswick.

raw.headline: Rockwell Automation (ROK) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
raw.summary: Shares of industrials automation company Rockwell (NYSE:ROK) jumped 2.6% in the after-market session after the company was commissioned to provide a robotic system for food producer Cranswick.

headline: Rockwell Automation (ROK) Launches FactoryTalk Orchestration As Heaven Hill And Cranswick Deploy Its Tech
summary: Rockwell Automation (NYSE:ROK) has introduced its FactoryTalk Orchestration software to coordinate material flow and production processes across manufacturing operations. The company is supplying core control and automation technology for Heaven Hill’s new distillery, including the PlantPAx DCS for digital control. Cranswick is using Rockwell Automation solutions for automated packaging with robotic pick and place systems, supporting more connected production lines. For investors tracking...

headline: LONGi Awarded "2026 Climate Lighthouse" Outstanding Case of 2026 Shanghai Climate Week: Zero-Carbon Technology Leads Green Transition
summary: The "2026 Climate Lighthouse" Conference, themed "Chain the Future, Co-create a New Climate Lighthouse Paradigm", was held during the Shanghai Climate Week. LONGi Green Energy Technology Co., Ltd. was recognized as an Outstanding Case of the "2026 Climate Lighthouse" for its "Battery Manufacturing Heating Self-Balancing and Zero External Heat Sourcing Project." headline: DA Davidson Initiates Rockwell Automation (ROK), Notes Strong Positioning in Industrial Automation
summary: Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE:ROK) is included among Billionaire Mario Gabelli’s Top 12 Dividend Stocks. On June 16, DA Davidson analyst Chris Dankert initiated coverage of Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE:ROK) with a Neutral rating. He also set a $500 price target on the stock. The analyst said the company is well-positioned to benefit from long-term industry […]

headline: Howard Lutnick Warns Of Chinese Robot Threat, Signals Crackdown On 'The Arms Race That Is Coming': Report
summary: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick signals scrutiny of Chinese robotics as Trump officials warn subsidized firms threaten U.S. industry.
